name: nax
description: Founder's idea-validation toolkit: validate tech startup ideas end-to-end with Bill Aulet's Disciplined Entrepreneurship, market research, competitive analysis, go-to-market, and pitch-deck tooling.

plugins.name: disciplined-entrepreneurship
plugins.description: Validate a tech startup idea end-to-end with Bill Aulet's Disciplined Entrepreneurship (24 steps / 6 themes) plus market research, competitive analysis, go-to-market, unit economics, and pitch-deck tooling. Ships 5 skills, 7 agents, 12 commands, scripts, and a per-venture workspace template.
